_description: Check for Calamities each time you achieve a Milestone. Roll 1D6; if roll <= total Calamity Points, subtract roll from total, then D100 on this table. Same Calamity cannot occur twice (take next, wrap around).

entries.name: Swarm Infestation
entries.description: The hostile alien lifeforms known as The Swarm have begun infesting the world.
entries.setup: Randomly select a non-enemy-held map sector. It is immediately infested.
entries.ongoing_effect: After each mission turn, roll D6 for each adjacent sector to a Swarm sector (choose test order). First 6 = infest that sector, stop testing. Adjacent to colony: D6 per infested sector (1-2 nothing, 3-5 damage equals die roll, 6 = 6 damage + grunt killed). Swarm expanding into colony sector = Pitched Battle next turn.
entries.resolution: Kill Swarm via Skirmish missions. Victory clears the sector. Calamity ends when every sector cleared.
entries.reward: Recruit one trooper to roster (can save for later, does not count against replacements).

entries.name: Environmental risk
entries.description: Long range scans have detected strange atmospheric anomalies that appear to be intensifying storms and radiation.
entries.setup: Randomly select 3 map sectors (can be enemy held). They are experiencing the anomalies.
entries.ongoing_effect: End of each campaign turn, roll D6 per anomalous sector: 1-4 no effect, 5-6 flare-up. Flare-up D6: 1-2 random crew in Sick Bay 1 turn, 3-4 colony sustains 1 damage (bypasses defenses), 5 no effect, 6 another random sector develops anomaly.
entries.resolution: Patrol Mission per sector with modifications: +1 Contact per round, complete 3 Objectives then move to one and roll 1D6+Savvy scoring 6+ (scientists roll twice pick best). Cleared sector = done.

entries.name: Enemy super weapon
entries.description: A random Tactical Enemy is building a super weapon that they intend to shoot at your colony.
entries.setup: Random Tactical Enemy (or roll new one if none on map). Weapon progress starts at 0.
entries.ongoing_effect: 1D6 progress per campaign turn. At 15: launch — 3D6 colony Integrity damage. Every 6 on damage roll = random character rolls on Post-Battle Injury table. Then resets to 0 and starts building again.
entries.resolution: Track down weapon site via Enemy Information roll. Then play Strike mission — success destroys production capability, ending the Calamity.
entries.reward: Roll twice on Post-Mission Finds table.

entries.name: Virus
entries.description: A dangerous virus is tearing through your colony.
entries.setup: Randomly select 2 roster characters. Roll 1D6 each: 1-5 = that many Virus Points, 6 = immediately ill.
entries.ongoing_effect: End of each campaign turn, select 3 roster characters. No Virus Points = roll as above. Has Virus Points = add +1. Total 6 = fall ill (quarantine in Sick Bay, no actions).
entries.resolution: Hunt missions yield 2 Cure Data each. Roll 2D6 at end of each turn (before virus spread). If roll <= total Cure Data, cure discovered. Virus stops spreading, all recover immediately.
entries.reward: Reduce any injury recovery times by total 4 turns spread among characters as desired (can save for later).

entries.name: Mega predators
entries.description: Your scouts report seeing particularly large and menacing wildlife when they are patrolling.
entries.ongoing_effect: Each time a Lifeform is revealed, roll 1D6. On 6, specimen has +1 KP. Roll again, adding KP until no 6.
entries.resolution: Patrol Missions. Each completed objective = +1 Contact (marked special). Special Contacts revealed = Lifeforms with +2 KP total. Kill 5 such enhanced Lifeforms to end Calamity.
entries.reward: Randomly select 3 map sectors, increase Resource ratings by +1 each.

entries.name: Wildlife aggression
entries.description: The lifeforms are far more aggressive than usual. Something appears to be agitating them. Your researchers speak of a Controller that must be located and destroyed.
entries.ongoing_effect: Any Contact reveal that places Lifeforms will place 1 additional Lifeform in nearest terrain feature.
entries.resolution: Hunt mission. Each Lifeform revealed: D6 per figure, on 6 = Controller (standard type + 3 KP). Controller flees toward nearest edge by shortest route (+1 inch move rate). Killing Controller + moving to confirm body = end Calamity.

entries.name: Robot rampage
entries.description: Suddenly, angry robots spill across the surface. They resemble the Sleepers detected before but appear to be acting as sentries.
entries.setup: In every mission, place a marker in each of the 6 terrain features closest to table center.
entries.ongoing_effect: When figure within 12 inches LoS of feature with marker: D6 per feature. 1-3 = nothing (remove marker), 4-5 = Sleeper with Beam Weapon, 6 = Sleeper + new marker in closest terrain feature (can chain).
entries.resolution: Kill Sleepers outside Delve missions, move to destruction location before battle ends, roll 1D6+Savvy (scientists roll twice pick best). 5+ = Sleeper chip found. Collect 5 chips = send shut-down signal at colony.

entries.name: Slyn assault
entries.description: The Slyn are stepping up their attacks.
entries.ongoing_effect: Every mission with Slyn interference chance: roll twice. If both indicate interference, automatically encounter 8 Slyn.
entries.resolution: Track Slyn kills. Once you have killed 30, they step down offensive. Calamity ends.
entries.reward: Immediately add 2 grunts to Colony Tracking Sheet.
